import pandas as pd


def calculate_totals(df):
    df["total"] = df["price"] * df["quantity"]
    return df


def filter_active_users(df):
    mask = (df["status"] == "active") & (df["age"] >= 18)
    return df[mask]


def build_summary(df):
    return pd.DataFrame({
        "name": df["name"],
        "revenue": df["price"] * df["units_sold"],
    })
